locator.quote: sampled per-agent in `population_manager.py:220`, but the env never receives them — it reads straight from `config.yaml`

text: Three reward genes were sampled per-agent in population_manager.py:220 but the env read shaping straight from config.yaml, so the per-agent values were silently ignored.
observation_window_ticks was sampled into the genome but never read, making it a fully dead gene.
